Remote proof check

Verify a PostSnail site URL.

Fetch public proof files from a creator domain. If the host blocks cross-origin fetches, publish CORS headers or verify the ZIP locally instead.

Result

No site checked

Enter a published PostSnail URL to fetch its signed identity, manifest, and latest commit.
